subcodes.first_line: Say: O beloved of God! Stand ye firm in His Cause and His love in such wise that neither shall calamities shake you nor aught prevail against you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا احباء الله ان اثبتوا علی امره و حبه علی شان لاتقلبکم البلایا و لایغلب علیکم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
